# godaddy_domain_actions (Data Source)

Read recent v2 actions for a GoDaddy domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain name to inspect.

### Read-Only

- `actions` (List of Object) Recent domain actions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--actions))

<a id="nestedatt--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `actions`

Read-Only:

- `completed_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `modified_at` (String)
- `origination` (String)
- `reason` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--actions--reason))
- `request_id` (String)
- `started_at` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--actions--reason"></a>
### Nested Schema for `actions.reason`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String)
- `fields` (List of String)
- `message` (String)
